description: Execute a named query from a dataflow and save results as Apache Arrow IPC binary. Supports LRO for long-running queries (up to 90s).
notes: Binary Arrow response saved to --file path. Without --file, reports metadata only (size in bytes). Use --arrow-version 1 (default) or 2 for format selection. Use --mashup for custom M expression override. LRO: server may return 202 for long queries; CLI polls automatically. Read Arrow files with Python: pyarrow.ipc.open_stream('output.arrow').read_all().

query_examples.description: Size of the Arrow result file.
